The '''''Glory''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] that belonged to [[Toob Ancher]]. He left [[Soco-Jarel Spaceport]] with the ''Glory'' around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Out of the Cradle|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
*{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter|reprint=1}}
